case_title: ARTHUR C. NOLASCO DBA ART''S MARTIN DOORS VS. YINGMING GU

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ARTHUR C. NOLASCO DBA ART'S MARTIN DOORS
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
